assertions.description: The CJMCU-925x PCB net list contains only GND, SCL, SDA, AD0, and various unconnected stubs — the +3.3V supply net from the schematic does not appear in the PCB nets at all. The power_net_routing analysis only reports GND. This suggests the +3.3V net is implemented entirely via copper zone fill (both layers have GND zones; +3.3V may be distributed through pads without a named net in the PCB file), or the +3.3V net was not transferred to the PCB. The power_net_routing section is therefore incomplete for the primary supply.
